message:
fix(validate,playbook): Pass config to safeCassSearch, align thresholds

validate.ts & commands/validate.ts:
- Pass config to safeCassSearch() for consistent degraded mode handling

playbook.ts:
- Use atomicWrite() for blocked log to prevent corruption
- Align score distribution thresholds with analyzeScoreDistribution:
  - excellent: >= 10 (was 5)
  - good: >= 5 (was 2)
  - neutral: >= 0
  - atRisk: < 0
